# Vardiff baseline characterization — `SlidingWindow-10t`

*Generated by `cargo run --release --bin generate-baseline` from the vardiff_sim crate. 1000 trials per cell, base seed `0xdeadbeefcafef00d`.*

## Convergence time (cold start: 10 GH/s → 1 PH/s)

| share/min | rate | p10 | p50 | p90 | p99 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 6 | 100.0% | 1m | 1m | 1m | 1m |
| 12 | 100.0% | 1m | 1m | 1m | 8m |
| 30 | 100.0% | 1m | 1m | 4m | 8m |
| 60 | 100.0% | 1m | 1m | 1m | 1m |
| 120 | 100.0% | 1m | 1m | 1m | 1m |

## Settled accuracy (stable load, post-convergence)

`|final_hashrate / true_hashrate - 1|` at trial end. Smaller is better.

| share/min | p10 | p50 | p90 | p99 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 6 | 0.0% | 0.0% | 28.3% | 36.7% |
| 12 | 0.0% | 0.0% | 20.8% | 26.7% |
| 30 | 0.0% | 0.0% | 0.0% | 17.0% |
| 60 | 0.0% | 0.0% | 0.0% | 12.7% |
| 120 | 0.0% | 0.0% | 0.0% | 0.0% |

## Steady-state jitter (fires per minute)

Post-convergence rate of vardiff fires. Smaller is better — ideal is zero under stable load.

| share/min | p50 | p90 | p99 | mean |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 6 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.091 | 0.002 |
| 12 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.083 | 0.002 |
| 30 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.000 |
| 60 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.000 |
| 120 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.000 |

## Reaction time to a 50% drop (step at 15 min)

| share/min | reacted | p10 | p50 | p90 | p99 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 6 | 36.9% | 2m | 4m | 5m | 5m |
| 12 | 65.3% | 2m | 4m | 5m | 5m |
| 30 | 96.5% | 2m | 4m | 5m | 5m |
| 60 | 100.0% | 2m | 3m | 4m | 5m |
| 120 | 100.0% | 2m | 3m | 3m | 4m |

## Reaction sensitivity (P[fire within 5 min of step change])

| Δ% | 6 | 12 | 30 | 60 | 120 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| -50% | 0.37 | 0.65 | 0.96 | 1.00 | 1.00 |
| -25% | 0.10 | 0.14 | 0.32 | 0.52 | 0.78 |
| -10% | 0.05 | 0.04 | 0.04 | 0.04 | 0.03 |
| -5% | 0.04 | 0.03 | 0.02 | 0.01 | 0.01 |
| +5% | 0.05 | 0.04 | 0.02 | 0.01 | 0.01 |
| +10% | 0.06 | 0.04 | 0.06 | 0.04 | 0.05 |
| +25% | 0.14 | 0.17 | 0.33 | 0.52 | 0.77 |
| +50% | 0.40 | 0.64 | 0.92 | 1.00 | 1.00 |

## Estimator bias

`E[H̃ − H_true] / H_true` averaged over post-settle ticks. Positive = systematic over-estimate. Populated only for algorithms that expose introspection (e.g. ClassicComposed, Parametric, EWMA-60s).

### Bias — stable load

| share/min | mean | p10 | p50 | p90 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 6 | -0.1% | -10.2% | 0.0% | 9.0% |
| 12 | -0.1% | -7.4% | -0.4% | 7.4% |
| 30 | 0.0% | -4.7% | 0.2% | 4.4% |
| 60 | -0.0% | -3.4% | 0.1% | 3.3% |
| 120 | 0.0% | -2.4% | 0.0% | 2.4% |

### Bias — cold start

| share/min | mean | p10 | p50 | p90 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 6 | 0.5% | -9.7% | 0.4% | 10.0% |
| 12 | 0.9% | -6.9% | 1.0% | 8.7% |
| 30 | 0.1% | -5.0% | 0.1% | 5.3% |
| 60 | -0.0% | -3.3% | -0.1% | 3.5% |
| 120 | -0.0% | -2.4% | -0.0% | 2.4% |

## Estimator variance

Population variance of `H̃ / H_true` over post-settle ticks (dimensionless). Populated only for algorithms that expose introspection.

### Variance — stable load

| share/min | mean | p10 | p50 | p90 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 6 | 0.012 | 0.003 | 0.008 | 0.025 |
| 12 | 0.006 | 0.001 | 0.004 | 0.012 |
| 30 | 0.002 | 0.001 | 0.001 | 0.004 |
| 60 | 0.001 | 0.000 | 0.001 | 0.002 |
| 120 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.001 |

### Variance — cold start

| share/min | mean | p10 | p50 | p90 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 6 | 0.013 | 0.003 | 0.008 | 0.029 |
| 12 | 0.007 | 0.002 | 0.005 | 0.016 |
| 30 | 0.003 | 0.001 | 0.002 | 0.006 |
| 60 | 0.001 | 0.000 | 0.001 | 0.002 |
| 120 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.000 | 0.001 |

## Ramp target overshoot (cold start)

`max(new_hashrate on fires) / H_true − 1`: how far the algorithm's actual *target* (not its belief) climbs past truth during the cold-start ramp. Reads `new_hashrate` (the actual target the algorithm set), so it's unaffected by estimator-belief noise. Works for any algorithm that fires, including those without introspection.

| share/min | p50 | p90 | p99 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 6 | 11.1% | 11.3% | 56.7% |
| 12 | 25.0% | 25.0% | 45.8% |
| 30 | 20.3% | 100.0% | 100.0% |
| 60 | 0.0% | 0.1% | 12.8% |
| 120 | 0.0% | 0.1% | 0.1% |

## Decoupling score (per share rate)

`reaction_rate(Step−50) × clamp(1 − jitter_p50 / J_max, 0, 1)` where `J_max = 0.50` fires/min. Higher is better. Score of 1.0 = perfect decoupling between reactivity and jitter.

| share/min | decoupling score |
| --- | --- |
| 6 | 0.369 |
| 12 | 0.653 |
| 30 | 0.965 |
| 60 | 1.000 |
| 120 | 1.000 |

## Reaction asymmetry (per share rate)

`reaction_rate(+δ%) − reaction_rate(−δ%)`. Positive = responds faster to up-steps; negative = responds faster to down-steps; near zero = symmetric.

| share/min | δ=5% | δ=10% | δ=25% | δ=50% |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 6 | +0.00 | +0.01 | +0.04 | +0.03 |
| 12 | +0.01 | +0.00 | +0.03 | -0.01 |
| 30 | -0.00 | +0.02 | +0.01 | -0.04 |
| 60 | +0.00 | -0.00 | -0.01 | -0.00 |
| 120 | +0.00 | +0.02 | -0.02 | +0.00 |
